chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1810 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.05.2022 Mr. Wishan Das Kolhi advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Assistant A.G. Sindh along with Inspector Miran Khan P.S Kot Ghulam Muhammad, District Mirpurkhas. ----- The Statement is filed along with attachments which disclose that case has been disposed of under ‘A’ Class by the concerned police. In view of the above, petition has served its purpose and is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
